typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		ContractNo as string,
		JobCardMainID as string,
		{Activity Code} as string,
		WorkpackCode as string,
		WorkPack as string,
		PlatForm as string,
		Progress_Grouping as string,
		Vessel as string,
		Discipline as string,
		SystemCode as string,
		System as string,
		SubSystemCode as string,
		SubSystem as string,
		SubDiscipline as string,
		TaskSheet_No as string,
		{Task Name} as string,
		IsTTA as string,
		Scope as string,
		ScopeCategory as string,
		CampaignCode as string,
		Campaign as string,
		ActualId as string,
		{Estimated Mhrs} as string,
		ProgressDate as string,
		{Cumm Actual Booking (Mhrs)} as string,
		{Daily Actual Booking (Mhrs)} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	purgeFiles: true,
	wildcardPaths:['Project_Data/NCSA/HDMS/HDMS_Booking/HDMS_Booking.csv']) ~> sourceHDMSBooking
sourceHDMSBooking derive(FileName = concat( 'Project_Data/NCSA/HDMS/HDMS_Booking/',        substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),1,4),        '/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),6,2),        '/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),9,2),        '/',        'HDMS_Booking_',        replace(replace(toString(currentTimestamp()),'.',''),':',''),        '.csv')) ~> setFileName
setFileName sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	rowUrlColumn:'FileName',
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
	mapColumn(
		ContractNo,
		JobCardMainID,
		{Activity Code},
		WorkpackCode,
		WorkPack,
		PlatForm,
		Progress_Grouping,
		Vessel,
		Discipline,
		SystemCode,
		System,
		SubSystemCode,
		SubSystem,
		SubDiscipline,
		TaskSheet_No,
		{Task Name},
		IsTTA,
		Scope,
		ScopeCategory,
		CampaignCode,
		Campaign,
		ActualId,
		{Estimated Mhrs},
		ProgressDate,
		{Cumm Actual Booking (Mhrs)},
		{Daily Actual Booking (Mhrs)},
		FileName
	)) ~> snkHDMSBookingRaw
